## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss DataGrid image integration, content delivery challenges, and process clarifications for GrowthX Labs team.](https://fathom.video/share/5cpPZ-M67HJzEFWp_MrXHQ5jhnV1ZTUA?tab=summary&timestamp=37.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [DataGrid images should be included even if not directly mentioned in the article, as long as they're relevant to the broader topic](https://fathom.video/share/5cpPZ-M67HJzEFWp_MrXHQ5jhnV1ZTUA?tab=summary&timestamp=246.0)
  - [Tables in Webflow are problematic; use checklists or convert to images instead](https://fathom.video/share/5cpPZ-M67HJzEFWp_MrXHQ5jhnV1ZTUA?tab=summary&timestamp=416.0)
  - [RAMP article delivery delayed by one day due to image creation and content adjustments needed](https://fathom.video/share/5cpPZ-M67HJzEFWp_MrXHQ5jhnV1ZTUA?tab=summary&timestamp=676.0)

## Topics

### DataGrid Image Integration Process

  - [Nika created four DataGrid editorials requiring images](https://fathom.video/share/5cpPZ-M67HJzEFWp_MrXHQ5jhnV1ZTUA?tab=summary&timestamp=47.0)
  - [Process: Log into DataGrid with PIMS account, navigate to Sales and CRM category](https://fathom.video/share/5cpPZ-M67HJzEFWp_MrXHQ5jhnV1ZTUA?tab=summary&timestamp=133.0)
  - [Include relevant connectors/images even if not directly mentioned in the article](https://fathom.video/share/5cpPZ-M67HJzEFWp_MrXHQ5jhnV1ZTUA?tab=summary&timestamp=246.0)
  - [Screenshot the "Create a new agent" pop-up to show available data sources and analysis types](https://fathom.video/share/5cpPZ-M67HJzEFWp_MrXHQ5jhnV1ZTUA?tab=summary&timestamp=276.0)
  - [Store images in a new folder within the external DataGrid master folder in Drive](https://fathom.video/share/5cpPZ-M67HJzEFWp_MrXHQ5jhnV1ZTUA?tab=summary&timestamp=341.0)
  - [Paste Drive image links into Google Doc and Atlas after editing](https://fathom.video/share/5cpPZ-M67HJzEFWp_MrXHQ5jhnV1ZTUA?tab=summary&timestamp=382.0)

### Webflow Content Formatting

  - [Tables are problematic in Webflow; avoid using them when possible](https://fathom.video/share/5cpPZ-M67HJzEFWp_MrXHQ5jhnV1ZTUA?tab=summary&timestamp=416.0)
  - [For "Build vs. Buy AI Agent Infrastructure" article:](https://fathom.video/share/5cpPZ-M67HJzEFWp_MrXHQ5jhnV1ZTUA?tab=summary&timestamp=519.0)
      - [Convert table to a checklist format](https://fathom.video/share/5cpPZ-M67HJzEFWp_MrXHQ5jhnV1ZTUA?tab=summary&timestamp=548.0)
      - [Change criteria into questions for headers](https://fathom.video/share/5cpPZ-M67HJzEFWp_MrXHQ5jhnV1ZTUA?tab=summary&timestamp=548.0)
      - [Use H2 header: "Checklist to Determine Build vs. Buy"](https://fathom.video/share/5cpPZ-M67HJzEFWp_MrXHQ5jhnV1ZTUA?tab=summary&timestamp=548.0)
      - [Utilize Webflow's native checklist feature for better rendering](https://fathom.video/share/5cpPZ-M67HJzEFWp_MrXHQ5jhnV1ZTUA?tab=summary&timestamp=548.0)

### Content Delivery and Adjustments

  - [Seth delivered articles, but hero body sections need updating](https://fathom.video/share/5cpPZ-M67HJzEFWp_MrXHQ5jhnV1ZTUA?tab=summary&timestamp=676.0)
  - [Meta information and categorization require changes](https://fathom.video/share/5cpPZ-M67HJzEFWp_MrXHQ5jhnV1ZTUA?tab=summary&timestamp=728.0)
  - [Estimated 90 minutes to complete hero body and meta adjustments using Cloud LLM](https://fathom.video/share/5cpPZ-M67HJzEFWp_MrXHQ5jhnV1ZTUA?tab=summary&timestamp=778.0)
  - [Delivery pushed to the following day to accommodate changes and image creation](https://fathom.video/share/5cpPZ-M67HJzEFWp_MrXHQ5jhnV1ZTUA?tab=summary&timestamp=819.0)

### Looker Reporting

  - [Only published articles should be added to Looker for tracking](https://fathom.video/share/5cpPZ-M67HJzEFWp_MrXHQ5jhnV1ZTUA?tab=summary&timestamp=622.0)
  - [Usman clarified that articles in "state" but not "approved" or "published" are excluded](https://fathom.video/share/5cpPZ-M67HJzEFWp_MrXHQ5jhnV1ZTUA?tab=summary&timestamp=622.0)

### RAMP Project Prioritization

  - [Editorials and refreshes have equal priority for VIC deliverables](https://fathom.video/share/5cpPZ-M67HJzEFWp_MrXHQ5jhnV1ZTUA?tab=summary&timestamp=875.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Nika to create a folder in the external DataGrid master Drive for image storage](https://fathom.video/share/5cpPZ-M67HJzEFWp_MrXHQ5jhnV1ZTUA?tab=summary&timestamp=341.0)
  - [Vivek to check with Ismail about HTML table implementation in Webflow](https://fathom.video/share/5cpPZ-M67HJzEFWp_MrXHQ5jhnV1ZTUA?tab=summary&timestamp=493.0)
  - [Nika to convert table to checklist format for the "Build vs. Buy" article](https://fathom.video/share/5cpPZ-M67HJzEFWp_MrXHQ5jhnV1ZTUA?tab=summary&timestamp=519.0)
  - [Team to complete hero body and meta adjustments using Cloud LLM](https://fathom.video/share/5cpPZ-M67HJzEFWp_MrXHQ5jhnV1ZTUA?tab=summary&timestamp=778.0)
  - [Deliver updated RAMP articles the following day](https://fathom.video/share/5cpPZ-M67HJzEFWp_MrXHQ5jhnV1ZTUA?tab=summary&timestamp=819.0)
  - [Vivek to follow up in thread regarding content delivery challenges](https://fathom.video/share/5cpPZ-M67HJzEFWp_MrXHQ5jhnV1ZTUA?tab=summary&timestamp=849.0)
